---
title: "Job Market Materials"
subtitle: "AY 2027–28"
description: "Job market materials packet for Alex Newhouse, PhD candidate in Political Science at CU Boulder."
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: right
---

[On the academic job market · 2027–28]{.jobmarket-banner}

This page collects everything a search committee, chair, or recruiter needs in one link. For anything else, please [email me](mailto:alex.newhouse@colorado.edu).

## At a glance

- **Field:** Political Science (Comparative Politics + Methodology)
- **Subfields:** Computational social science, political violence, technology & politics
- **Methods:** Transformer NLP, social network analysis, time-series causal inference
- **Advisors:** Andrew Q. Philips & Jennifer Fitzgerald (co-chairs); Alexandra Siegel; Brian Keegan (Information Science, external)
- **Expected defense:** May 2028
- **Available to start:** Fall 2028

## Job market paper

::: {.callout-jmp}
**"'The Happening Is Coming': Apocalyptic Rhetoric on 4chan Following Mass Casualty Attacks"**

A transformer classifier and intervention-analysis study of 11 years of 4chan /pol/ posts, showing that online apocalyptic rhetoric spikes in the immediate aftermath of mass-casualty terrorist attacks. Evidence of a feedback loop between digital communities and offline violence.

Presented at APSA 2025. **Full PDF available on request** — [email me](mailto:alex.newhouse@colorado.edu).
:::

## Materials

- [Curriculum Vitae (PDF)](cv.pdf)
- [Research statement](research-statement.html)
- [Teaching statement](teaching-statement.html)
- [Dissertation overview](dissertation.html)
- [Sample syllabus — INTD 1027 Post-War Fascism](intd1027-syllabus.html)
- [Sample teaching materials — R tutorial series](tutorials.html)
- [Code portfolio — DistilBERT for Political Text Classification](political-text-classification.html)

## References

Available on request — please email me and I will arrange introductions.

## Other useful links

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=NLXqzpoAAAAJ)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0003-6346-9527)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/alexbnewhouse)

[Last updated: April 2026]{.last-updated}
